name: Stu's Tuna Fish
recipeIngredient: 1 can Solid white tuna, drain water
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tuna thoroughly.
2. Purchase solid white tuna packed in water.
3. Add 2 heaping tablespoons of sweet relish and about one full teaspoon of either oregano or celery seed to the tuna. Adjust seasoning as desired by tasting.
4. Mix all ingredients well in a bowl.
